enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Thirutu Pasanga'?

The song 'Thirutu Pasanga' humorously portrays the playful antics of boys in love, emphasizing their charming yet mischievous nature.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Theeya Velai Seiyyanum Kumaru, the song reflects the carefree and romantic moments of the characters, enhancing the film's light-hearted narrative.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Ranina Reddy and Saindhavi, with music composed by Sathya C.

When was 'Thirutu Pasanga' released?

'Thirutu Pasanga' was released on May 4, 2013, as part of the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Thirutu Pasanga' from Theeya Velai Seiyyanum Kumaru is a lively and upbeat track that encapsulates the playful spirit of young love. It showcases the charming antics of boys as they navigate their feelings in a light-hearted manner. The catchy lyrics and energetic music evoke a sense of joy and celebration, making it perfect for festive occasions. Overall, the song conveys a fun and carefree vibe, resonating with anyone who has experienced the thrill of youthful romance.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thirutu Pasanga from the movie Theeya Velai Seiyyanum Kumaru is a vibrant celebration of youthful mischief and romance. With the delightful voices of Ranina Reddy and Saindhavi, this track perfectly captures the essence of fun and flirtation. The catchy beats and playful lyrics make it an irresistible anthem for parties and celebrations.
stanzaMeanings: Talking sweetly, feeling sentimental, even if we try to feel cute,
Every day saying hello, sending poems in SMS, even if I say love you,
Everyone is a real troublemaker, all the boys are real troublemakers,
Troublemakers, troublemakers, beautiful troublemakers, clear troublemakers, proper troublemakers,
If I look into your eyes, you will come to the beach and give me snacks, if you run, love will come,
If I hit you, you will shout, if I hit you on the head, you will say 'hi', if I lie, you will say 'please', no matter what I say or do, all boys - let's say one more time,
Troublemakers, troublemakers, beautiful troublemakers, clear troublemakers, proper troublemakers,
Oh my love, without you, I am nothing, even if I say it softly, I am still a troublemaker,
Oh dear, oh dear, oh dear, oh dear, oh dear, oh dear,
Talking sweetly, feeling sentimental, even if we try to feel cute,
Every day saying hello, sending poems in SMS, even if I say love you,
Everyone is a real troublemaker, all the boys are real troublemakers, let's say one more time,
Troublemakers, troublemakers, beautiful troublemakers, clear troublemakers, proper troublemakers,
